name: l2_powered_source_request_plan
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredSourceRequestPlan packages hover and cruise source-map targets with static L2 request geometry.
note: Reference surface for future A4MC powered source request envelopes.

name: l2_bridge
value: Aerodynamics4McL2Bridge can build static L2 force moment requests but currently has no powered source-term request surface.
note: Current bridge capability boundary for request building.

name: l2_drone_probe
value: Aerodynamics4McL2DroneProbe supplies the static wind-tunnel grid and baseline force-moment request geometry.
note: Static request geometry paired with future powered source terms.

name: l2_powered_hover_source_map
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverSourceMap supplies hover per-rotor body-force source targets.
note: Hover source-map target consumed by this request plan.

name: l2_powered_cruise_source_map
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredCruiseSourceMap supplies cruise per-rotor body-force source targets.
note: Cruise source-map target consumed by this request plan.

name: aerodynamics4mc_l2_target
value: Aerodynamics4MC Core is the upstream target for future powered body-force or porous-source request support.
note: Upstream CFD target for future powered source request support.
